reason: This sample demonstrates excellent dataset quality across all three layers. The assistant systematically explores the repository using appropriate tools (tree, glob, grep), stays grounded in tool outputs, and provides accurate summaries of the heraldic information found. The user behaves like a realistic researcher with natural phrasing and plausible follow-up requests. The planner's goals are coherent and the trajectory meaningfully reflects them - progressing from project exploration to finding relevant files to extracting specific content about post-Soviet state symbols. Minor note: there was an initial inconsistency in the tree output (React/TypeScript) versus later findings (Python/country data), but the assistant handled this appropriately by expanding the search. No hallucination or fabrication issues detected.
